channel.title: CrowAgent Changelog
channel.description: Product and website updates from CrowAgent.

item.title: Free tools and methodology pages expanded
item.description: Added and refined free compliance tools, methodology pages, and supporting resources across MEES, PPN 002, Cyber Essentials, late payment, CSRD, and VSME workflows.

item.title: Website quality, accessibility, and reliability pass
item.description: Improved redirects, security headers, form validation, social metadata, tap targets, and automated audit coverage for the public website.
